title: valeriana capitata subsp. pubicarpa
intro: Valeriana capitata subsp. pubicarpa, also known as valerian or valerian root, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, belonging to the Valerianaceae family. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anxiolytic effects, which have been used to treat insomnia, restlessness, and anxiety. The health benefits of valerian root include improved sleep quality, reduced stress levels, and a calming effect on the nervous system. Valerian root is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
